judgment.summary: Strong growth and profitability metrics are tempered by significant leverage and low liquidity.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 53.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 43.4% YoY — indicates strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current Q 216.5% — very high expected earnings growth.
Analyst growth est, current FY 83.0% — substantial full-year earnings growth projected.
Operating margin 26.6% and Profit margin 11.5% — healthy profitability.
Return on equity 42.9% — excellent returns for shareholders.
negatives: Current ratio 0.90 and Quick ratio 0.26 — indicates potential short-term liquidity issues.
Total debt $19.93B vs $658.00M cash — significant debt burden.
Forward P/E 13.28 is lower than trailing P/E 24.68, but PEG ratio 1.15 suggests growth is largely priced in.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines, Vistra Corp. (VST) presents a fundamental picture for traders to consider. The company is expected to report significant earnings growth this quarter and fiscal year, building on a strong beat in its last reported quarter. However, a high Debt/Equity ratio and a low current/quick ratio warrant attention.

examples.body: $GFS 😊always feels good when you made the right moves!!!$MRVL $CRDO $VST Hold GFS long term and I really believe it’s gonna be big.
